source: Plan 14-06 hand-calc; King County WA conforming limit $1,027,000 (2026 high-cost tier from data/reference/conforming-limits-2026.yml); SFH @ $625,000 with $15k/mo household → Conv30 + Conv15 + FHA30 all eligible at 20% DP; cascade Level 5 GO
notes: Cascade level 5 (GO-ALL-GREEN) per lib.property_verdict.synthesize: 2 non-FHA programs eligible at preferred 20% DP (Conv30, Conv15) AND no income-shock stress failures at the chosen $15k/mo income. PITI composition per Pitfall 6: tax_monthly=$500.00 ($6000/12), insurance_monthly=$100.00 ($1200/12), HOA=$0.00 (SFH). DTI back-end uses unchanged $15,000/mo income + $400/mo obligations. LTV: Conv 0.800000; FHA 0.814000 (UFMIP-financed inflates). Verdict.reasons[0]: predicate_code=GO-ALL-GREEN, computed_value='2' (count of non-FHA eligible programs at preferred DP).
